title: Meet Oscar – A gentle soul in need of a forever home
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Oscar, a beautiful three-year-old, was left behind by his owner, abandoned to face whatever fate lay ahead. When he was found, both his skin and spirit were in desperate need of healing.


> Though it takes him a little time to trust, Oscar has shown nothing but gentleness and a quiet longing for love. He’s ready for a second chance at life—with someone who will never give up on him.


If you can open your heart and home to Oscar, please contact the Garden Route SPCA.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
